title: Client Time
description: Override the time and weather on the client
body:
Override the time and weather on the client.  
By default this mod doesn't do anything, you need to enable the overrides for time, moon phase and weather using the keybinds or the menu using the checkboxes.  
![Client Time screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RQaNgahP/images/a2efa22fe940909d51de45f650deef9085592b36.png)
![Keybinds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RQaNgahP/images/f4885bda2ecd579da3ee69c6660007c3d7791d46.png)
